auth.hrSubtitle: Sign in to your company account.
auth.hmSubtitle: Sign in to your hiring manager account.
auth.reauthSubtitle: For security, please re-enter your password to access the admin console.
auth.createSubtitleTalent: Find your next role through curated AI matches.
auth.createSubtitleHr: Set up your HR admin account to start receiving AI-matched talent.
auth.createSubtitleHm: Find and hire top talent through AI-powered matching.
auth.byContinuing: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.byContinuingTail: and consent to AI-powered compatibility analysis of your data.
auth.passwordHint: Min. 12 characters — include uppercase, lowercase, number and symbol.
auth.passwordWeak: Must be 12+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, number and symbol.
auth.checkEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to
auth.checkEmailFinish: Open it on this device to finish signing in.
auth.checkEmailSpam: Can't find it? Check your spam or junk folder.
auth.errorBody: We couldn't complete sign-in. Please try again.
auth.tryAgainHint: If this keeps happening, clear your browser cache for this site and retry.
auth.signInTimeout: Sign-in timed out — please refresh the page and try again.

landing.title: We connect brilliance with opportunity.
landing.subtitle: AI-curated recruitment for every industry in Malaysia. Three matches, zero noise.
landing.subtitleLine1: AI-curated recruitment for every industry in Malaysia.
landing.talentDesc: Let AI find the right opportunities for you. Get 3 curated roles, no applications.
landing.hiringDesc: Let AI find the right talent for your role. Get 3 curated candidates, fast.
landing.videoSubtitle: A quick look at how DNJ's AI curates your top three matches — from profile to offer.
landing.videoIframeTitle: DNJ — how Bole works in 60 seconds
landing.howSubtitle: No cold applications. No CV black hole. Complete your profile once and let Bole — our advanced AI — find the right fit.
landing.howStep1Desc: Tell us your career story — skills, goals, salary expectations, culture fit. Five minutes. No resume required.
landing.howStep2Desc: Our AI reads your six facets — skills, trajectory, character, working style, growth potential and culture fit — across every active role in Malaysia.
landing.howStep3Desc: Three employers. Three genuine fits. You review, decide, and connect — no applications fired into the void.
landing.howFreeNote: Free to join · No application fees
landing.boleTitle: The AI that recognises your brilliance
landing.boleNamedLead: Named after the legendary talent scout 伯樂 (Bole), who could spot an extraordinary horse in any crowd. Our Bole doesn't manufacture talent — it
landing.boleDiamondLine: You're already a diamond. Bole's job is to make sure the right people see it.
landing.boleWhyThreeBody: Three genuinely-aligned opportunities demand your full attention. Three hundred listings demand nothing but your time.
landing.passiveTitle: Your profile works while you sleep
landing.passiveLine1: You don't send applications. Bole sends you matches.
landing.passiveLine2: Complete your profile once and our AI continuously scans new roles across every industry — alerting you to the right opportunity before it ever reaches the open market.
landing.passivePoint2: No cold applications into the void
landing.passivePoint3: Early visibility into roles before they go public
landing.passivePoint4: Candidate confidentiality — employers see only what you share
landing.passiveScanCaption: Bole scans continuously — matching happens automatically as new roles open
landing.referBody: Refer a friend to DNJ and earn platform reward points when they receive their first curated match. Every brilliant person deserves to be seen.
landing.whatsappPrefill: Hi DNJ, I have a question about the platform.
landing.contactBodyLead: Reach us on WhatsApp for quick questions, or email us at
landing.whatsappHours: Mon – Fri, 9am – 6pm MYT · We also reply out-of-hours

consent.title: Data Processing Consent and Waiver
consent.subtitle: We need your explicit consent before we can match you. Please read carefully.
consent.agreeLabel: I have read and agree to the consent and waiver above.
consent.networkTimeout: Network is slow — please try again.

referral.title: Invite a friend, earn points
referral.subtitle: Share your code. When they finish onboarding, you get {{points}} points.

points.redeem: Redeem {{cost}} Diamond Points for 1 free extra match
points.title: Your points wallet
points.subtitle: Earn points by engaging with the platform. Redeem them for extra matches.
points.referralFriendBonus: {{n}} Diamond Points for new friend too
points.ruleRejectMatch: Reject a proposed match and explain why (each)
points.ruleAcceptMatch: Accept a match and attend the interview
points.ruleEndReview: Submit an end-to-end review after your journey
points.ruleReferral: A friend joins using your referral link
points.ruleReferred: You joined via a friend's referral link
points.noTransactionsHint: Start earning by engaging with your matches.

consult.title: Book a private career consult
consult.subtitle: Talk through your direction with a senior advisor. Pick the depth that fits your moment.

tierDesc.quick: A short read on your current direction — best for a single, focused question.
tierDesc.standard: Enough time to walk through your situation and get tailored, actionable next steps.
tierDesc.deep: Full session — covers career direction, timing windows, and a 6–12 month plan.

consult.footnote: Sessions run on a private 1-on-1 video call. After payment you'll receive your unique link by email.
consult.paid: Payment received — your session is confirmed.
consult.willEmail: We'll email you the video link shortly. If you don't see it within a few minutes, check spam.
consult.pendingConfirm: We haven't received the payment confirmation yet. This page will update once it arrives — usually within a minute.
consult.couldNotConfirm: We couldn't confirm your booking. Please contact support if payment was deducted.
consult.couldNotStart: Could not start payment. Please try again.

data.title: Data requests
data.intro: Exercise your rights under Malaysia's PDPA 2010. See the
data.introTail: for context. We respond within 21 days.
data.typeAccess: Access — send me a copy of my data
data.accessLogIntro: This log shows when admins or system processes accessed your personal data in the last 100 events.
data.correctionHelp: Admin reviews each correction before it's applied. Requests outside this list require email.
data.deleteWarnHeading: ⚠ This will permanently erase your account
data.deleteWarnPurge: Your profile, matches, and activity are purged 30 days after the request is approved.
data.deleteWarnPoints: Any unused Diamond Points are forfeited and cannot be refunded.
data.deleteWarnAudit: Audit records required for legal compliance are retained per PDPA obligations.
data.errDeleteConfirm: Type DELETE in the confirmation box to proceed.
data.errPrivacy: {{field}} must be public, anonymous, or whitelist.

mfa.enrollSubtitle: Admin accounts require TOTP two-factor authentication. Scan the QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.).
mfa.scanInstruction: Open your authenticator app and scan the QR code below.
mfa.manualEntry: Can't scan? Enter the key manually
mfa.verifyInstruction: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm setup.
mfa.challengeSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to access the admin console.

cookieBanner.title: This site uses browser storage
cookieBanner.body: We store the following data in your browser's localStorage to make the platform work:
cookieBanner.item1: Session token — keeps you signed in (managed by Supabase Auth)
cookieBanner.item2: Admin re-authentication timestamp — 30-minute window after password confirmation
cookieBanner.item3: Signup referral code — saved temporarily until account creation completes
cookieBanner.item4: Selected account role — saved temporarily during the signup flow
cookieBanner.learnMore: No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used. See our

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp updates
whatsapp.optIn: Send me match updates on WhatsApp

cashier.selectOrderHint: Pick an open order from the list to collect payment.

shifts.tipPoolHint: Splits the shift's tip total by hours worked + tables served.

staleLoop.hmBannerHeading: 3 days live — here's how this role compares
staleLoop.hmBannerIntro: We checked the market against {{count}} similar vacancies. Apply a suggestion to update the form, or keep your current settings.
staleLoop.talentBannerHeading: 3 days in — let's see what's holding things back
staleLoop.talentBannerIntro: We've spotted {{count}} open vacancies that line up with your profile. A small tweak could unlock several of them.

gap.salaryBelowMedian: Salary cap RM {{roleMax}} is below the market median RM {{marketMedian}}. Suggested: raise max to RM {{suggestMax}}.
gap.arrangementStricter: Onsite-only — {{flexPct}}% of similar roles offer remote or hybrid. Suggested: switch to hybrid.
gap.ownCarUncommon: Only {{pct}}% of similar roles require own car. Consider dropping this requirement.
gap.overtimeUncommon: Only {{pct}}% of similar roles require overtime. Consider dropping this requirement.
gap.travelUncommon: Only {{pct}}% of similar roles require travel. Consider dropping this requirement.
gap.salaryExpectationAboveMarket: Most roles cap around RM {{marketMax}}; your minimum is RM {{expectedMin}}. Consider lowering to RM {{suggestMin}}.

login.seoDescription: Sign in to your DNJ account to view your curated matches, manage your profile, or post new roles.
login.tooManyAttempts_one: Too many failed attempts. Please try again in {{count}} minute.
login.tooManyAttempts_other: Too many failed attempts. Please try again in {{count}} minutes.
login.enterEmailPassword: Please enter your email and password.
login.securityCheckFailed: Security check failed. If you've had multiple failed login attempts, please wait 15 minutes and try again.
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in {{count}} minutes.

signup.seoDescription: Join DNJ — Malaysia's curated recruitment platform. Three matches, zero noise.
signup.referredByCodeTail: — your friend earns points when you finish onboarding.
signup.consentDataHr: I consent to DNJ collecting my company and professional data to power AI-driven talent matching. All data is fully encrypted and never disclosed to third parties.
signup.consentMarketHr: I consent to anonymised comparison of our compensation benchmarks against market salary data.
signup.consentDataHm: I consent to DNJ collecting my professional data to power AI-driven talent matching. All data is fully encrypted and never disclosed to third parties.
signup.consentMarketHm: I consent to anonymised comparison of compensation benchmarks against market salary data.
signup.consentDataTalent: I consent to DNJ collecting my personal data to power advanced AI-driven compatibility analysis. My data is encrypted at rest and is never disclosed to employers without my explicit consent at the offer stage.
signup.consentMarketTalent: I consent to anonymised comparison of my salary expectations against market data.
signup.consentTos: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Notice.
signup.googleModalSubtitle: Please review and accept the required consents to proceed.
signup.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.errorConsents: Please accept the required consents above.
signup.errorCaptcha: Please complete the security check (or re-verify if it expired).
signup.networkError: Network error — please check your connection and try again.

passwordReset.seoDescription: Request a secure password reset link for your DNJ account.
passwordReset.title: Reset your password
passwordReset.subtitle: We'll email you a link to set a new one.
passwordReset.sentBody: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a password reset link.

talentOnboard.boGreeting:
Hey there! I'm DNJ, your career buddy. Let's keep this easy — just a few quick questions to get a feel for what you're after. Nothing heavy, I promise.

To kick things off: what kind of role are you hoping to land next? Even a rough idea works perfectly.
talentOnboard.aiSlowWarning: AI is taking longer than usual — if this doesn't resolve, please refresh the page to continue.
talentOnboard.chatDoneMessage: Two more quick things — your date of birth (encrypted, never shown to employers) and your documents. Then you're all set.
talentOnboard.progressSaved: Progress saved. Feel free to continue whenever you're ready.
talentOnboard.chatError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
talentOnboard.basicsIntro: Before we start — just your name and a contact number. These stay on our servers and are never shared with AI systems.
talentOnboard.switchToHiring: Hiring instead? Switch to a hiring account
talentOnboard.chatPlaceholder: Type your message… (Shift + Enter for new line)
talentOnboard.fieldDobConsent: Consent to share date of birth
talentOnboard.dobRequiredBody: We use it to find roles where you'll thrive at this stage of your career. Without it we cannot produce matches and the platform serves no purpose for you. DOB is encrypted at rest and is
talentOnboard.languagesLabel: Languages you can speak (select all that apply):
talentOnboard.commuteQuestion: Does commute distance matter to you?
talentOnboard.openNewFieldLabel: I'm open to trying a new field.
talentOnboard.openNewFieldHint: We'll surface part-time / gig / internship roles outside your background. Full-time roles still favour your past experience.
talentOnboard.dobConsentLabel: I agree to share my date of birth with DNJ to help find roles where I'll thrive. Encrypted and never shown to employers.
talentOnboard.tickToContinue: Please tick the box to continue.
talentOnboard.fillToContinue: Please fill in the following to continue:
talentOnboard.age18Error: You must be at least 18 years old to use DNJ.
talentOnboard.dealBreakersIntroLead: Tell us your non-negotiables — things you will
talentOnboard.dealBreakersIntroTail: compromise on. Roles that conflict with these will be filtered out automatically.
talentOnboard.dbNoLicence: I do not have a driving licence
talentOnboard.dbNoOwnCar: I don't have my own car / transport
talentOnboard.dbRemoteOnly: Remote or hybrid only — no full-time office
talentOnboard.dbNoOvertime: No overtime — strict working hours only
talentOnboard.minSalaryLabel: Minimum salary I will accept (RM / month)
talentOnboard.anythingElseHint: e.g. "Must be hybrid or remote", "No night shifts", "Company must provide transport"
talentOnboard.requirementPlaceholder: Type a requirement and press Enter or Add
talentOnboard.noDealBreakers: No non-negotiables set — you can skip this if you're flexible.
talentOnboard.extrasIntro: A few more details so we can surface the right roles. All optional — skip anything that doesn't apply.
talentOnboard.skillsHint: Tag the skills you've actually used at work. Up to 20.
talentOnboard.langProficiencyHint: Pick a level so we don't match you to roles that need a level you don't have.
talentOnboard.identifyAsHint: Tick any that apply — helps employers find you for roles open to your stage.
talentOnboard.environmentsHint: Tick what you can tolerate. Leave blank if you have no strong preferences.
talentOnboard.docsIntro: Last step — upload your documents. Only you and verified employers can see these.
talentOnboard.photoHint: JPG or PNG, max 2 MB. Used on your candidate profile.
talentOnboard.nricNote: Note: We do not require NRIC or passport scans. An optional Identity-Verification Badge will be available later.
talentOnboard.docsRequired: Please add both a photo and a résumé before continuing.
talentOnboard.reviewIntroLead: Here's what we've captured. Take a moment to review — when you click
talentOnboard.reviewIntroTail: we'll save it right away and finish analysing in the background.
talentOnboard.savingProfileHint: Just a few seconds — uploading your files and locking in your answers. Our AI will finish your summary in the background.
talentOnboard.freeMatchesBody: Earn Diamond Points by giving feedback, completing interviews, and referring friends — or buy more.

hmOnboard.boGreeting:
Hey! I'm Bolé, your hiring buddy at DNJ. I'll ask you a few questions to understand your hiring needs — and everything you share here will be used to automatically set up your first role, so you won't have to fill anything in twice.

First up: what role are you hiring for and which industry are you in?
hmOnboard.noHmRecord: No hiring-manager record found for your account. Ask your HR contact to re-send the invite.
hmOnboard.diamondPointsInfo: Our AI Bolé will screen all our candidates and hand-pick your 3 best matches — for free.
hmOnboard.chatSlowWarning: AI is taking longer than usual — if this doesn't resolve, please refresh the page to continue.
hmOnboard.chatAlmostDone: Almost done — a few quick questions about the role requirements and your background, then you're all set.
hmOnboard.chatProgressSaved: Progress saved. Feel free to continue whenever you're ready.
hmOnboard.chatError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
hmOnboard.basicsIntro: Before we start — just your name and job title. These stay on our servers and are never shared with AI systems.
hmOnboard.switchToTalent: Looking for work instead? Switch to a talent account
hmOnboard.chatPlaceholder: Type your message… (Shift + Enter for new line)
hmOnboard.mustHavesIntro: Candidates who don't meet these requirements will be automatically excluded from your results.
hmOnboard.constraintDrivingLicense: Role requires own driving licence / transport
hmOnboard.constraintNightShifts: Shift work or night shifts involved
hmOnboard.constraintRelocation: Candidate must be willing to relocate
hmOnboard.constraintOnsiteOnly: On-site only — no hybrid or remote
hmOnboard.constraintOwnTransport: Candidate must have own car / transport
hmOnboard.constraintCommission: Role includes commission or variable pay component
hmOnboard.additionalReqHint: e.g. "Must speak fluent Mandarin", "Degree required", "Min 3 years sales experience"
hmOnboard.additionalReqPlaceholder: Type a requirement and press Enter or Add
hmOnboard.demographicsIntro: A few quick details about you — helps us pitch you to the right talent. Encrypted and never shown to candidates.
hmOnboard.languagesLabel: Languages you speak (select all that apply):
hmOnboard.hiringDetailsIntro: A few process details that help us prioritise and match correctly.
hmOnboard.budgetLabel: Has budget been approved for this hire?
hmOnboard.budgetPendingNote: We'll hold shortlisting until you confirm budget is approved.
hmOnboard.salaryFlexLabel: Is the salary range flexible for an exceptional candidate?
hmOnboard.failure90Label: What does failure look like at 90 days?
hmOnboard.failure90Hint: e.g. "Unable to close first deal independently", "Still asking basic process questions"
hmOnboard.failure90Placeholder: Describe what a disappointing first 90 days would look like…
hmOnboard.dobIntro: We'd love to know a little more about you so we can pitch you to the right talent — the kind of person who'll really click with how you work. Just your date of birth and gender. Encrypted and never shown to candidates.
hmOnboard.dobConsentLabel: I agree to share these details with DNJ to help find the right talent for me. Encrypted and never shown to candidates.
hmOnboard.dobSkipExplain: No problem — without it, we'll just try to match you with talent around your age or younger. You can always add this later from your profile to unlock our full matching.
hmOnboard.reviewIntro: Here's what we've captured. Review before we build your hiring profile.
hmOnboard.reviewDobSkipped: Skipped — you can add this later from your profile
hmOnboard.doneSubtitle: Taking you to your hiring dashboard…

companyRegister.title: Register your company
companyRegister.subtitle: We verify every company before roles go live. An admin will approve within 1 business day.
companyRegister.roleHrAdmin: I'm an HR Admin / Company Owner
companyRegister.hmNotice: As a Hiring Manager you can skip the SSM number and license upload — your HR Admin will complete company verification. You'll get a shareable link after registration.
companyRegister.ssmHint: Your Suruhanjaya Syarikat Malaysia company number.
companyRegister.licenseHint: PDF or image. Max 5 MB. Stored privately; only admins can view. You can submit now and upload later — verification won't complete until it's provided.
companyRegister.errSsmRequired: SSM registration number is required for HR Admin registration.
companyRegister.errSessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
companyRegister.errTimedOut: {{label}} timed out. Please check your internet and try again.
companyRegister.doneBody: Your company {{name}} is registered. To post roles you need your HR Admin or company secretary to complete verification by uploading the SSM registration and business license.
companyRegister.doneShareLabel: Share this verification link with your HR Admin:
companyRegister.doneShareHint: Your HR Admin opens this link, logs in, and uploads the SSM certificate + business license. Roles can go live only after admin verification.

talentDash.pageDescription: Up to three curated matches at a time. Accept or decline — no applications needed.
talentDash.iosHint: Add DNJ to your home screen to enable alerts on iPhone
talentDash.analysingBody: Our AI is putting together your career summary. This usually finishes in under 2 minutes — your matches will start appearing once it's ready.
talentDash.analysisFailedLead: We couldn't finish analysing your profile.
talentDash.statSlotsHint: We curate up to 3 at a time
talentDash.emptyDescription: Our engine reviews new roles every hour. You'll see up to 3 offers as soon as they're ready. Pilot estimate: ~14 days.
talentDash.urgentHeading: 🔥 Urgent Priority Job Search — {{cost}} Diamond Points
talentDash.urgentSubtitle: Surface 1 top-matching open role on the spot — no waiting on the queue.
talentDash.urgentStayOpen: Stay open to offers — if this employer's match engine surfaces you, the role will appear above as a regular match.
talentDash.urgentConfirm: Spend {{cost}} Diamond Points to instantly surface 1 top-matching open job?
talentDash.urgentNoRole: No matching open role right now.
talentDash.urgentFound: Found 1 top-matching open job. Balance: {{balance}} Diamond Points.
talentDash.extraUnlockRemaining: Unlock one extra offer curated for you. You have {{count}} extra unlock(s) remaining.
talentDash.extraPayOrSpend: Pay RM 9.90 or spend {{cost}} Diamond Points.
talentDash.extraPayOrSpendBalance: Pay RM 9.90 or spend {{cost}} Diamond Points (balance: {{balance}}).
talentDash.extraEarnHint: You have {{balance}} / {{cost}} Diamond Points. Earn them from feedback (+5), interviews, and referrals (+19) — or top up on the
talentDash.redeemNeedPoints: Need {{cost}} Diamond Points (you have {{balance}}). Earn more from feedback, interviews, or referrals.
talentDash.redeemConfirm: Spend {{cost}} Diamond Points to unlock 1 extra offer curated for you?
talentDash.redeemSuccess: Redeemed {{cost}} Diamond Points — your extra offer is being surfaced now.
talentDash.savedBody: Our AI is now analysing your conversation in the background — usually under 2 minutes. You can leave or close this tab; matches will start flowing once your summary is ready.
talentDash.savedShareNote: We'll only share your summary with a Hiring Manager when there's a match.
talentDash.proposalHeading: The hiring manager proposed 3 times — pick one
talentDash.proposalNoneWork: None of these work — ask for new times
talentDash.offerReceivedTitle: You have received a job offer!
talentDash.offerCongratsLead: Congratulations — the hiring manager wants to hire you for
talentDash.offerCongratsTail: Accept to move forward, or decline if it's not the right fit.
talentDash.feedbackPlaceholder: How was the interview experience? Your feedback improves hiring quality (optional)
talentDash.reactivateBody: It's been a while — please confirm these details are still accurate. Matching depends on them to find the right roles.
talentDash.quickCheckBody: Confirm these are still accurate so matching finds you the right roles.
talentDash.profileExpiredBody: New matches are paused. Revive to start receiving opportunities again.
talentDash.extendNowBody: Extend now to keep matching active.
talentDash.completenessHigh: Great — your profile gives employers a strong picture.
talentDash.completenessMid: Good start — a few more details will improve your match quality.
talentDash.completenessLow: Complete your profile to get better-matched opportunities.
talentDash.fieldsMissing: {{count}} field(s) missing — see what to add
talentDash.errPaymentNoUrl: Could not start payment — no URL returned.
talentDash.errConfirmSlot: Could not confirm the interview slot

hmDash.pageDescription: Curated shortlists for your active roles. Invite to interview or decline — up to three per role.
hmDash.linkRequestTitle: {{company}} wants to add you to their team
hmDash.linkRequestBody: Accepting will link your profile under their company umbrella. You can still manage your own roles.
hmDash.dobAlertTitle: Add a little more about you to start matching
hmDash.dobAlertBody: We're missing your date of birth — without it we can't pitch you to the right talent. Takes 10 seconds. Encrypted, never shown to candidates.
hmDash.companyPendingBody: You can post roles and review matches freely. When you're ready to contact a candidate, ask your HR manager to upload your company SSM certificate and business license.
hmDash.moreMatchesBody: Earn Diamond Points by giving feedback, completing interviews, and referring friends — or unlock an extra match instantly for RM9.90.
hmDash.coldStartBody: We're growing the pool. You'll be notified as soon as we have 3 candidates for each.
hmDash.proposeTimesHint: Offer the candidate three time slots (MYT). They'll pick one to confirm.
hmDash.draftBannerTitle: Your first role is ready — pre-filled from onboarding
hmDash.draftReviewHint: Review the details, adjust anything that's off, then activate it to start receiving up to 3 curated candidates.
hmDash.emptyPostFirstDesc: Tell us about the role you want to fill and we'll surface up to three candidates.
hmDash.emptyNoMatchesDesc: Our engine hasn't found a strong fit yet. Try widening the salary range or removing one required trait — that often unlocks the match.
hmDash.emptyCuratingDesc: Our engine reviews new talent every hour. You'll see up to 3 candidates per role as they arrive.
hmDash.urgentSearchDesc: Skip the queue and surface the single best candidate for a role on the spot.
hmDash.needMoreBody: Each role fills up to 3 curated candidates for free. Unlock up to 3 more per role — pay RM 9.90 or spend {{points}} Diamond Points.
hmDash.insufficientPoints: You have {{have}} / {{need}} Diamond Points. Earn them from feedback (+5), interviews, and referrals (+19) — or top up on the
hmDash.urgentConfirm: Spend {{cost}} Diamond Points to instantly surface 1 top candidate for this role?
hmDash.urgentReady: Urgent candidate ready ({{pct}}% match) — highlighted below. Balance: {{balance}} Diamond Points.
hmDash.paymentNoUrl: Could not start payment — no URL returned.
hmDash.redeemNeedPoints: Need {{points}} Diamond Points (you have {{have}}). Earn more from feedback, interviews, or referrals.
hmDash.redeemConfirm: Spend {{points}} Diamond Points to unlock 1 extra candidate for "{{role}}"?
hmDash.redeemSuccess: Redeemed {{points}} Diamond Points — your extra candidate is being surfaced now.
hmDash.resumeLocked: Résumé unlocks once your HR manager verifies the company profile (SSM + business license).
hmDash.askHrUpload: To proceed, please ask your HR manager to upload your company SSM certificate and business license.
hmDash.inviteLocked: Invite is locked until your company profile is verified by HR.
hmDash.invitationSent: Invitation sent — the candidate has been notified.
hmDash.candidateDeclined: Candidate declined — they will not be contacted further for this role.
hmDash.cardLockTitle: Locked until your HR uploads your company SSM + business license. Use the amber banner at the top of the dashboard to share the verification link.
hmDash.withdrawFirstHint: Withdraw the pending proposal first to send new times.
hmDash.feedbackPlaceholder: What stood out? Your notes train the matching engine (optional)
hmDash.feedbackSavedHelps: ✓ Feedback saved — helps improve future matches
hmDash.statusAcceptedByTalent: Talent accepted — ready for your invite
hmDash.statusInterviewScheduled: Interview scheduled — join your video link
hmDash.statusInterviewCompleted: Interview complete — make an offer or decline
hmDash.cultureTalentWants: ~ talent wants this — confirm in interview
hmDash.reliabilityFactors: Factors into how your roles are ranked to talent
hmDash.reliabilityImproveHint: Your reliability score affects how your roles rank in matching. To improve it: show up to scheduled interviews, ensure JDs are accurate, and follow through on offers.

hrDash.pageDescription: Manage interview scheduling and your hiring manager team.
hrDash.selfHmBanner: You're now a hiring manager too. <profileLink>Complete your leadership profile</profileLink> to unlock smarter candidate matching, or jump straight to <postRoleLink>posting a role</postRoleLink>.
hrDash.hmSectionSubtitle: They define what each role on their team needs.
hrDash.hmEmptyDesc: Let hiring managers create the vacancy — they work with the role every day and know the right fit better than anyone else. They are the jewelers who shape the diamond.
hrDash.alsoHmPrompt: Are you also the hiring manager for your team?
hrDash.addMeAsHm: + Add me as a hiring manager
hrDash.openRolesSubtitle: Posted by your hiring managers. Read-only — they own role content.
hrDash.openRolesEmptyNoHm: Once you invite hiring managers, the roles they post will appear here.
hrDash.openRolesEmptyNoRoles: Your hiring managers haven't posted any roles yet.
hrDash.scheduleInterviewsSubtitle: When a hiring manager invites a candidate, schedule the interview here.
hrDash.nothingToScheduleDesc: When a hiring manager invites a candidate, it will appear here for you to propose a time.
hrDash.addMeModalTitle: Add yourself as a hiring manager
hrDash.addMeModalBody: You'll be added to your company's hiring-manager list and able to post roles directly. You can complete the leadership profile (used for matching) right after.
hrDash.errTimeout: Taking too long — tap Retry to try again.

myRoles.title: My roles
myRoles.description: Every role you've posted. Pause to stop curation, reopen to resume matching.
myRoles.emptyDescription: Post your first role to start receiving candidates.
myRoles.matchGenFailed: Role activated but match generation failed — our team will retry shortly.
myRoles.noticePending: Your role is being screened by our compliance system. This usually takes under a minute.
myRoles.noticeFlagged: Our automated system flagged this role for human review. Matching is paused until an admin approves it.
myRoles.noticeRejected: This role was blocked because it appears to violate our policy on illegal or fraudulent postings.
myRoles.appealSubtitle: Our reviewer will look at this within 1 business day. Be specific — license numbers, registration details, or context that explains why the role is legitimate.
myRoles.appealPlaceholder: e.g. We are SC-licensed financial advisors (CMSL/A0123). The 'investment' wording refers to our licensed unit-trust distribution business…
myRoles.appealMinLength: Please write at least 10 characters explaining the role.

hmSettings.title: Settings
hmSettings.optInLabel: Send me WhatsApp notifications for new candidate matches, interview updates, and important alerts.
hmSettings.invalidPhone: Phone number contains invalid characters. Use digits, spaces, + or hyphens only (e.g. +60 12 345 6789).

hmAccount.title: Account
hmAccount.passwordHelp: Request a password reset link to be sent to your email address.

hmCompany.title: Company profile
hmCompany.description: Your professional details and company information.
hmCompany.nameTitleRequired: Name and job title are required.

editRole.title: Edit role
editRole.subtitle: Update the role details below.
editRole.notOwner: You are not the owner of this role.
editRole.prefilledNotice: This role was pre-filled from your onboarding answers. Review the details below, then click <1>Activate role</1> to start receiving candidates.
editRole.editsApplyNotice: Edits apply immediately to existing matches. Status: <1>{{status}}</1>.
editRole.nudgeHeading: 3 days live — here's how this role compares
editRole.nudgeBody: We checked the market against {{count}} similar vacancies. Apply a suggestion to update the form, or keep your current settings.
editRole.gapSalaryBelowMedian: Salary cap RM {{roleMax}} is below the market median RM {{marketMedian}}. Suggested: raise max to RM {{suggestMax}}.
editRole.gapArrangementStricter: Onsite-only — {{pct}}% of similar roles offer remote or hybrid. Suggested: switch to hybrid.
editRole.gapOwnCar: Only {{pct}}% of similar roles require own car. Consider dropping this requirement.
editRole.gapOvertime: Only {{pct}}% of similar roles require overtime. Consider dropping this requirement.
editRole.gapTravel: Only {{pct}}% of similar roles require travel. Consider dropping this requirement.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

about.seoTitle: About DNJ — Bole, the AI That Recognises Your Brilliance
about.seoDescription: DNJ is an AI-curated recruitment platform for Malaysia. Meet Bole — our advanced AI talent scout that recognises your potential and matches you with the leader who brings out your brilliance. You're already a diamond; let the world see it.
about.seoKeywords: about DNJ, what is DNJ, DNJ recruitment, Bole AI, AI talent scout, AI recruitment Malaysia, advanced AI matching, curated recruitment, how DNJ works, diamond and jeweler recruitment, AI job matching Malaysia, three matches recruitment
about.heroBodyLead: Your brilliance is real — most job boards just can't see it.
about.heroBodyTrail: , our advanced AI, recognises what others miss and matches you with the leader who brings your light out. Three matches. Not three thousand listings.
about.transBody: The brilliance is already in you. What's missing isn't talent — it's the eye that recognises it, and the setting that lets it shine.
about.transCard1Body: Your potential is real — but uncut, it's easy to miss. Generic job boards bury you among millions.
about.transCard2Body: Our AI sees the diamond others walk past — reading your facets the way the legendary Bole spotted a thousand-li horse.
about.transCard3Body: Matched to the right leader and the right setting, your brilliance finally catches the light.
about.boleEyebrow: MEET BOLE — YOUR AI TALENT SCOUT
about.boleTitle: The legend who could see greatness others missed.
about.boleP1Lead: In Chinese tradition, Bole was the one man who could recognise a
about.boleP1Mid: — an extraordinary talent — that everyone else walked straight past. The horse was always extraordinary. What was rare was the
about.boleP2Lead: We named our AI after him. Bole doesn't create your worth — it
about.boleP2Tail: it, reading six facets of who you are, then introduces you to the leaders who'll help it shine.
about.vsTitle: Most platforms make you search. Bole makes you seen.
about.vsOrdinary1: A thousand listings — you sift through them alone
about.vsOrdinary3: You apply cold and hope someone replies
about.vsDnj1: Bole recognises you and returns 3 settings where you'll shine
about.vsDnj2: Matched on your facets — who you are, not just keywords
about.vsDnj3: You're discovered — the right leaders come to you
about.employerTitleLead: The right leader doesn't create talent — they
about.employerBody: A great leader brings out the brilliance a person already carries. Bole matches you with high-potential people ready for exactly that — aligned to your team, your culture and your brief.
about.companyCompliance: PDPA-compliant · End-to-end encrypted · All industries, nationwide
